toolu_5674f18b19454674ba67a7c7.prompt:
Visit https://github.com/BruceJqs/MyNotebook and examine the mkdocs.yml configuration file. I need to understand:

1. The `pymdownx.highlight` configuration - what exact settings does he use for code blocks?
2. Any `pymdownx.superfences` or other code-related extensions
3. The `extra_css` or `extra_javascript` settings
4. The `theme` section, especially any `features` related to navigation
5. Any custom CSS files referenced

Also, look at his docs/stylesheets or docs/css directory for any custom CSS related to:
- Code blocks styling (line numbers, language labels)
- Mobile navigation drawer / hamburger menu (`.md-nav--primary`, `.md-nav__link`, etc.)
- Any z-index or pointer-events related CSS

Report the exact mkdocs.yml content and any relevant CSS files.

toolCalls.name: WebFetch

input.prompt: Return the complete, exact content of this mkdocs.yml file without any summarization or truncation.

# yaml-language-server: $schema=https://squidfunk.github.io/mkdocs-material/schema.json
#[Info]

site_name: BruceJin's Notebook
site_url: https://note.eternity1005.top/
site_author: Eternity # your name
#[UI]
theme:
  name: material
  custom_dir: docs/overrides #覆写路径
  logo: assets/头像.jpg #左上角logo，可插入图片链接
  favicon: assets/头像.jpg 
  palette:
    - media: "(prefers-color-scheme)"
      toggle:
        icon: material/link
        name: 关闭自动模式
    - media: "(prefers-color-scheme: light)"
      scheme: default # 日间模式
      primary: blue # 上方的
      accent: indigo # 链接等可交互元件的高亮色
      toggle:
        icon: material/toggle-switch # 图标
        name: 切换至夜间模式 # 鼠标悬浮提示
    - media: "(prefers-color-scheme: dark)"
      scheme: slate # 夜间模式
      primary: black
      accent: indigo
      toggle:
        icon: material/toggle-switch-off-outline
        name: 切换至日间模式

  features:
    - announce.dismiss #呈现可标记为由用户读取的临时公告，可以包含一个用于取消当前公告的按钮
    - navigation.tracking #地址栏中的 URL 将自动更新为在目录中突出显示的活动锚点
    - navigation.tabs #顶级部分将呈现在上面视口标题下方的菜单层中，但在移动设备上保持原样
    # - navigation.sections #启用部分后，顶级部分在边栏中呈现为1220px以上视口的组，但在移动设备上保持原样
    - navigation.top # 返回顶部的按钮 在上滑时出现
    - navigation.footer #页脚将呈现在边栏中，但在移动设备上保持原样
    - search.suggest # 搜索输入一些字母时推荐补全整个单词
    - search.highlight # 搜索出的文章关键词加入高亮
    - search.share #搜索分享按钮
    # - navigation.expand # 打开Tab时左侧目录全部展开
    - navigation.indexes #启用节索引页后，可以将文档直接附加到节
    - content.tabs.link
    - content.tooltips
    - content.code.copy #代码复制
    - content.action.edit
    - content.action.view
    - content.code.annotate
    # - navigation.instant
    #- header.autohide  #自动隐藏
    # - navigation.tabs.sticky  #启用粘性选项卡后，导航选项卡将锁定在标题下方，并在向下滚动时始终保持可见
  language: zh # 一些提示性的文字会变成中文

  icon:
    repo: fontawesome/brands/github #右上角图标
    logo: logo
    previous: fontawesome/solid/angle-left
    # top: fontawesome/solid/angles-up
    alternate: fontawesome/solid/language
# edit_uri: edit/main/docs # 编辑按钮跳转的链接
...
</persisted-output>

toolCalls.name: Bash

input.command: curl -sL "https://api.github.com/repos/BruceJqs/MyNotebook/git/trees/main?recursive=1" | python3 -c "import sys,json; [print(t['path']) for t in json.load(sys.stdin)['tree'] if any(x in t['path'].lower() for x in ['css','stylesheet','style','extra'])]"
input.description: Find CSS/stylesheet files via GitHub API

499	plugins:
500	  - ai-summary:
501	      ai_service: "glm"  # or "openai", "gemini", "glm"
502	      summary_language: "zh"  # or "en"
503	      cache_enabled: true
504	      local_enabled: true
505	      cache_expire_days: 30
506	      # debug: true # 是否显示调试信息（默认：false）
507	      enabled_folders:
508	        - blog/    # 添加blog文件夹
509	        - develop/ # 添加develop文件夹
510	        # - docs/    # 保留docs文件夹
511	      exclude_patterns:
512	        - about/
513	        - index.md
514	        - tag.md
515	        - blog/posts/update.md
516	        - blog/category/
517	        - blog/posts/
518	  - search:
519	      enabled: !ENV [CI, false]
520	      separator: '[\s\u200b\-\u3000\u3001\u3002\uFF0C\uFF0E\uFF1F\uFF01\uFF1B]+'
521	      lang:
522	        - zh
523	        - en

541	  - git-committers:
542	      enabled: !ENV [CI, false]
543	      repository: BruceJqs/MyNotebook
544	      branch: main
545	      exclude:
546	        - index.md
547	        - tag.md
548	        - liuyanban.md
549	        - blog/posts/update.md
550	        - blog/posts/wkw.md
551	        - about/link.md
552	  - git-revision-date-localized:
553	      enabled: !ENV [CI, false]
554	      type: iso_date
555	      enable_creation_date: false
556	      exclude:
557	        # - index.md
558	        - tag.md
559	        - liuyanban.md
560	        - blog/posts/update.md
561	        - blog/posts/wkw.md
562	        - about/link.md
563	        - websitebeauty/linktech.md
564	  # - statistics:
565	  #     words_per_minute: 200
566	  - blog: #博客配置
567	      post_date_format: full #时间
568	      draft: true
569	      draft_if_future_date: true #自动将具有未来日期的帖子标记为草稿
570	      post_readtime: true
571	      post_readtime_words_per_minute: 265 #计算帖子的阅读时间时读者每分钟预计阅读的字数
572	      post_url_format: "{date}/{slug}"
573	      # categories_slugify: !!python/object/apply:pymdownx.slugs.slugify
574	      #   kwds:
575	      #     case: lower
576	      pagination_url_format: "page/{page}"
577	      authors_file: "{blog}/.authors.yml" #作者信息
578	  - tags

580	markdown_extensions: #详见https://squidfunk.github.io/mkdocs-material/setup/extensions/python-markdown-extensions/ 和 https://squidfunk.github.io/mkdocs-material/setup/extensions/python-markdown/
581	  - abbr
582	  - attr_list
583	  - admonition
584	  - def_list
585	  - footnotes
586	  - md_in_html
587	  # - meta # 支持Markdown文件上方自定义标题标签等
588	  - pymdownx.caret
589	  - pymdownx.betterem
590	  - pymdownx.critic
591	  - pymdownx.details
592	  - pymdownx.inlinehilite
593	  - pymdownx.keys
594	  - pymdownx.mark
595	  - pymdownx.snippets
596	  - pymdownx.smartsymbols
597	  - pymdownx.tilde
598	  - pymdownx.superfences:
599	      custom_fences:
600	        - name: mermaid
601	          class: mermaid
602	          format:
603	            !!python/name:pymdownx.superfences.fence_code_format # 代码块高亮插件
604	  - pymdownx.arithmatex: # latex支持
605	      generic: true
606	  - toc:
607	      permalink: true
608	      toc_depth: 4
609	  - pymdownx.highlight: # 代码块高亮
610	      anchor_linenums: true
611	      linenums: true # 显示行号
612	      # auto_title: true # 显示编程语言名称
613	  - pymdownx.emoji:

toolu_5674f18b19454674ba67a7c7.result:
Here is the complete report.

---

## BruceJqs/MyNotebook -- mkdocs.yml and CSS Analysis

### 1. pymdownx.highlight Configuration

```yaml
- pymdownx.highlight: # 代码块高亮
    anchor_linenums: true
    linenums: true # 显示行号
    # auto_title: true # 显示编程语言名称
```

Key points:
- `anchor_linenums: true` -- line numbers are anchor links (clickable for sharing)
- `linenums: true` -- line numbers are always shown
- `auto_title` is **commented out**, so language labels are NOT automatically displayed on code blocks
- `pymdownx.inlinehilite` is also enabled (for inline code highlighting)

### 2. pymdownx.superfences and Code-Related Extensions

```yaml
- pymdownx.superfences:
    custom_fences:
      - name: mermaid
        class: mermaid
        format: !!python/name:pymdownx.superfences.fence_code_format
- pymdownx.inlinehilite
- pymdownx.critic
- pymdownx.caret
- pymdownx.keys
- pymdownx.mark
- pymdownx.snippets
- pymdownx.smartsymbols
- pymdownx.tilde
- pymdownx.betterem
- pymdownx.arithmatex:
    generic: true
- pymdownx.emoji
- pymdownx.tabbed:
    alternate_style: true
- pymdownx.tasklist:
    custom_checkbox: true
- pymdownx.details
```

Theme-level code features:
```yaml
features:
  - content.code.copy     # Copy button on code blocks
  - content.code.annotate # Annotatable code blocks
```

### 3. extra_css and extra_javascript

**extra_css** (all served via jsDelivr CDN from `Wcowin/Mkdocs-Wcowin`):
```yaml
extra_css:
  - https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Wcowin/Mkdocs-Wcowin@main/docs/stylesheets/extra.css
  - https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Wcowin/Mkdocs-Wcowin@main/docs/stylesheets/link.css
  - https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Wcowin/Mkdocs-Wcowin@main/docs/stylesheets/customize.css
  - https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Wcowin/Mkdocs-Wcowin@main/docs/stylesheets/ziti.css
```

**extra_javascript**:
```yaml
extra_javascript:
  - https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Wcowin/Wcowin.github.io@main/docs/javascripts/glm-config.js
  - https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Wcowin/Wcowin.github.io@main/docs/javascripts/glm-translate.js
  - https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Wcowin/Wcowin.github.io@main/docs/javascripts/extra.js
  - https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Wcowin/Wcowin.github.io@main/docs/javascripts/mathjax.js
  - https://unpkg.com/mathjax@3/es5/tex-mml-chtml.js
  - https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mathjax@3/es5/tex-mml-chtml.js
  - https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Wcowin/Wcowin.github.io@main/docs/javascripts/view.js
```

### 4. Theme Section -- Navigation Features

```yaml
theme:
  name: material
  custom_dir: docs/overrides
  language: zh
  features:
    - announce.dismiss
    - navigation.tracking
    - navigation.tabs
    # - navigation.sections          # COMMENTED OUT
    - navigation.top
    - navigation.footer
    - search.suggest
    - search.highlight
    - search.share
    # - navigation.expand            # COMMENTED OUT
    - navigation.indexes
    - content.tabs.link
    - content.tooltips
    - content.code.copy
    - content.action.edit
    - content.action.view
    - content.code.annotate
    # - navigation.instant           # COMMENTED OUT
    # - header.autohide              # COMMENTED OUT
    # - navigation.tabs.sticky       # COMMENTED OUT
```

Notable: `navigation.tabs` is enabled but `navigation.tabs.sticky` is commented out. `navigation.expand` and `navigation.instant` are also disabled.

### 5. Custom CSS Files

**customize.css** (86 lines active + lots of commented-out scrollbar/footer code):
- CSS variables for primary color: `--md-primary-fg-color: #518FC1`
- Custom admonition icons (`pied-piper`, `pied-piper1`) with green styling
- Rounded corner containers (`#rcorners1` through `#rcorners6`)
- Button styles (`.buttoncss`, `.buttonxuan`, `.buttonxuan2`, `.buttonxuan3`)
- Markdown grid card styling with rounded corners and shadows
- Table of contents secondary nav indentation guide: `nav.md-nav--secondary ul ul { border-left: 1px solid #B0B4BA; }`
- Link underline removal: `.md-typeset a { text-decoration: none !important; }`
- Search bar rounding: `.md-search__form { border-radius: var(--base-border-radius); }`
- Admonition rounding: `.md-typeset .admonition, .md-typeset details { border-radius: 1.5em; }`

**extra.css** (556 lines -- actually the largest file):
- Card components (`.card`) with hover transforms, GPU acceleration
- Bilibili video embed container (`.aspect-ratio`) -- commented out
- QR code / donation container (`.reward-container`, `#qr`)
- Mask effect (`.mask`)
- Video container (`.video-container`)
- Runnable code block styling (`.runnable-code`, `.code-header`, `.run-btn`)

**link.css** (95 lines):
- Friend link page card styles, avatars, header styling
- Mobile responsive: `@media (max-width: 768px) { .card { width: 100%; float: none; } }`

**ziti.css** (19 lines):
- Imports `LXGW WenKai` font from zeoseven CDN
- Applies `font-family: "LXGW WenKai"` to body
- Top button font styling

### Key Finding: No Mobile Nav Drawer CSS

None of the CSS files contain any overrides for `.md-nav--primary`, `.md-nav__link`, `z-index`, or `pointer-events` related to the mobile navigation drawer / hamburger menu. The only `.md-nav` related rule is a TOC indentation guide line in customize.css (line 546):

```css
nav.md-nav--secondary ul ul {
  border-left: 1px solid #B0B4BA;
}
```

And a search rounding rule in customize.css (lines 23-35):
```css
.md-search__form { border-radius: var(--base-border-radius); }
[data-md-toggle="search"]:checked ~ .md-header .md-search__form { ... }
```

### Summary

For code blocks, BruceJqs uses: `pymdownx.highlight` with `anchor_linenums: true` and `linenums: true` (no `auto_title`), plus `pymdownx.superfences` for Mermaid support, `pymdownx.inlinehilite`, and Material theme features `content.code.copy` and `content.code.annotate`. He does NOT have any mobile nav drawer CSS customizations -- the hamburger menu behavior is left as default MkDocs Material.
